Description: AI Audit Ledger — API Gateway, SQS, QLDB, Lambdas (EU AI Act Article 12)

Properties.Description: JSON map of ingest API key → tenant_id for AI Audit Ledger
JSON map of read API key → tenant_id ("*" = admin) for AI Audit Ledger

Properties.AlarmDescription: One or more audit events failed to save after 5 retries. Check CloudWatch Logs for ProcessorFn.

Properties.Description: AI Audit Ledger ingestion + read API
Properties.Name: AiAuditLedger

Properties.Description: AI Audit Ledger ingestion + read API

Fn::Join: Lambda function for auto-deleting objects in

TenantKeySecretArn.Description: Secrets Manager ARN for tenant key map — add/remove customers here

ReadKeySecretArn.Description: Secrets Manager ARN for read key map — manage dashboard access here

AuditBucketName.Description: S3 bucket with Object Lock — tamper-evident archive

DashboardUrl.Description: Hosted dashboard URL — share this with customers

DlqAlarmName.Description: CloudWatch alarm — fires if any audit record fails to save

DlqUrl.Description: Dead-letter queue URL — inspect failed messages here

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
